zh.lifeSummary: Margery de Rishworth是Henry de Rishworth和Mrs De Rishworth的女兒，於1280年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾利申沃斯。她於1300年之前與Sir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MP在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1384年3月31日在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾坦可斯利享年104歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rishworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rushworth
meanings: English: habitational name from Rishworth (Yorkshire), from Old English risc ‘rush’ + worth ‘enclosure’. There is often confusion between this name and Rushforth .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margery de Rishworth was born in 1280, in Rishworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Henry de Rishworth and Mrs De Rishworth. She married Sir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MP before 1300, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 31 March 1384, in Tankersley, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 104.

fr.lifeSummary: Margery de Rishworth est née en 1280, à Rishworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Henry de Rishworth et Mrs De Rishworth. Elle a épousé Sir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MP avant 1300, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 31 mars 1384, à Tankersley, South Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 104 ans.

Sie hat vor 1300 in England Sir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MP geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 31. März 1384 im Alter von 104 Jahren in Tankersley, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margery de Rishworth è nata il nel 1280 nel Rishworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Henry de Rishworth e Mrs De Rishworth. Lei sposato Sir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MP prima del 1300, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 31 marzo 1384, nel Tankersley, South Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 104 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Rishworthは1280年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリシュウオルスでHenry de RishworthとMrs De Rishworthの娘として生まれた。1300年以前にイギリスでSir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MPと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1384年3月31日にイギリスイギリスソウス ヨークシュアイアタンケルスリーで104歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Rishworth(은)는 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리슈워스에서 Henry de Rishworth(와)과 Mrs De Rishworth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1300년 이전 영국에서 Sir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MP(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 3월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 탠커슬리에서 104세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margery de Rishworth nasceu em 1280, em Rishworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Henry de Rishworth e Mrs De Rishworth. Ela casou-se com Sir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MP antes 1300, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 31 de março de 1384, em Tankersley, South Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 104 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margery de Rishworth родилась в 1280 г. в местности ришворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Henry de Rishworth и Mrs De Rishworth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Savile Sheriff of Yorkshire, MP перед 1300 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 31 марта 1384 г. в местности танкирсли, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 104 лет.
